chooseLanguage: Tilni tanlang · Выберите язык · Choose a language 👇
welcome: 👋 Hello, {{name}}! Kichkintoy is the official bot of the kindergarten app for parents. 🔑 If you have a family invitation code, type it here (6 digits). 📱 If you already have an account, sign in to the app with Continue with Telegram.
fallback: Enter a 6-digit invitation code or use the Kichkintoy app.
invalidCode:
❌ This code is wrong or has expired.

Check the code and try again.
cooldown: ⏳ Too many attempts. Please try again in 24 hours.
acceptedNoEffect: Invitation accepted, but every child already has 3 guardians — nobody was added.
declined: Invitation declined. If this was a mistake, enter the code again.
loginConfirm: 🔐 Confirm signing in to your Kichkintoy account?
loginApproved: ✅ Login confirmed! Return to the Kichkintoy app.
loginInvalid: This login link has expired. Try again in the app.
noAccount:
You don't have a Kichkintoy account yet.

Ask your family member for a 6-digit invitation code.
